text: Standing in the entrance, I am greeted by a pervasive quiet and an almost sterile clarity—glass, light, space, all arranged with purpose. I feel simultaneously small and curious, ready to step into a realm of ideas. When I turn and see the vibrant, information-rich wall of R+D, my curiosity peaks. There is excitement in the blend of technology and creativity. Here, the promise of discovery pulls me forward, while the design suggests I am in a place meant for open exploration. I feel anticipation, tempered by the serene formality of the setting. It's a space that wants me to think and question.
